role: Head of the Judiciary (2009–2019); Chairman of the Expediency Discernment Council
bio: Sadegh Larijani served as head of Iran's judiciary from 2009 to 2019, appointed by [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei). His tenure coincided with the crackdown on the [Green Movement](/events/green-movement-protests-2009) and the prosecution of political dissidents. He subsequently became chairman of the [Expediency Discernment Council](/orgs/expediency-discernment-council). He is the brother of [Ali Larijani](/people/ali-larijani), the former Speaker of Parliament, making the Larijani family one of the most powerful political dynasties in the Islamic Republic.
editorial_notes: Brother of Ali Larijani. Born in Najaf to a clerical family of Iraqi-Iranian heritage.
